title: Nexis Arsenal
description: 3 mythical weapons with unique abilities — Solar Dash, Soul Drain, and Thunder Throw.
body:
# Nexis Arsenal
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/v3QALpPSLuU" title="Проигрыватель YouTube" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

> ⚠️ **Beta** — Work in progress. Expect updates.

A small weapon mod adding **3 unique mythical weapons** with special abilities and visual effects.

## ⚔️ Weapons

| Weapon | Ability |
|--------|---------|
| **Solaris Blade** | Right-click — Solar Dash forward, ignites enemies |
| **Necro Scythe** | Right-click — Soul Drain aura, damages and lifesteal from nearby enemies |
| **Volt Gauntlet** | Right-click — Throw a lightning-charged hammer |

## 📋 Requirements
- Minecraft **1.21.11**
- Fabric Loader **≥ 0.15.0**
- Fabric API
